subject: [POLICY] Add strimzi kafka config from helm charts
commit_message:
[POLICY] Add strimzi kafka config from helm charts

Add strimzi kafka user and topics for policy components in
relevant helm charts.

Issue-ID: POLICY-4133
Signed-off-by: Sirisha_Manchikanti <sirisha.manchikanti@est.tech>
Change-Id: If0e1107c03acdfed83bfc359a45ad546d134bd30

Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/5464/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/5464/ )

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/5464/ )
